rules.rule: every composition draft MUST be reviewer-authored and reviewer-attributed.
every composition draft MUST cite synthesis_id (layer 41) and a deterministic ordered list of section_ids.
section ordering MUST be reviewer-declared and deterministic; hidden insertion or reordering is FORBIDDEN.
every section reference MUST resolve to an existing section_composition or carry a reviewer-declared inline body.
composition manifests are append-only; in-place mutation is FORBIDDEN.
compositions MUST cite manual_kind ∈ MANUAL_KINDS for governance routing.
